en: He entered Jericho and was passing through.
zh: 耶穌進了耶利哥，正經過的時候，

en: And there was a man named Zacchaeus. He was a chief tax collector and was rich.
zh: 有一個人名叫撒該，是稅吏長，又很富有。

en: And he was seeking to see who Jesus was, but on account of the crowd he could not, because he was small of stature.
zh: 他想看看耶穌是怎麼樣的，因為人多，他又身材矮小，就看不見。

en: So he ran on ahead and climbed up into a sycamore tree to see him, for he was about to pass that way.
zh: 於是他跑到前頭，爬上一棵桑樹，要看看耶穌，因為耶穌就要從那裡經過。

en: And when Jesus came to the place, he looked up and said to him, "Zacchaeus, hurry and come down, for I must stay at your house today."
zh: 耶穌到了那裡，往上一看，對他說：“撒該，快下來，今天我要住在你家裡。”

en: So he hurried and came down and received him joyfully.
zh: 他就趕快下來，歡歡喜喜地接待耶穌。

en: And when they saw it, they all grumbled, "He has gone in to be the guest of a man who is a sinner."
zh: 眾人看見就紛紛議論說：“他竟到罪人家裡去住宿！”

en: And Zacchaeus stood and said to the Lord, "Behold, Lord, the half of my goods I give to the poor. And if I have defrauded anyone of anything, I restore it fourfold."
zh: 撒該站著對主說：“主啊，請看，我要把家財的一半分給窮人，我若敲詐了誰，就還他四倍。”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Today salvation has come to this house, since he also is a son of Abraham.
zh: 耶穌說：“今天救恩到了這家，他也是亞伯拉罕的子孫。

en: For the Son of Man came to seek and to save the lost."
zh: 因為人子來，是要尋找拯救失喪的人。”

en: As they heard these things, he proceeded to tell a parable, because he was near to Jerusalem, and because they supposed that the kingdom of God was to appear immediately.
zh: 眾人聽這些話的時候，因為耶穌已經接近耶路撒冷，又因他們以為 神的國快要出現，他就講了一個比喻，

en: He said therefore, "A nobleman went into a far country to receive for himself a kingdom and then return.
zh: 說：“有一個貴族往遠方去要接受王位，然後回來。

en: Calling ten of his servants, he gave them ten minas, and said to them, 'Engage in business until I come.'
zh: 他叫了自己的十個僕人來，給他們一千銀幣，說：‘你們拿去作生意，等到我回來。’

en: But his citizens hated him and sent a delegation after him, saying, 'We do not want this man to reign over us.'
zh: 他本國的人卻恨他，就派使者跟著去說：‘我們不願意這個人作王統治我們。’

en: When he returned, having received the kingdom, he ordered these servants to whom he had given the money to be called to him, that he might know what they had gained by doing business.
zh: 他得了王位回來，就吩咐把那些領了錢的僕人召來，要知道他們作生意賺了多少。

en: The first came before him, saying, 'Lord, your mina has made ten minas more.'
zh: 第一個走過來說：‘主啊，你的一百銀幣，已經賺了一千。’

en: And he said to him, 'Well done, good servant! Because you have been faithful in a very little, you shall have authority over ten cities.'
zh: 主人說：‘好，良善的僕人，你既然在最小的事上忠心，可以有權管理十座城。’

en: And the second came, saying, 'Lord, your mina has made five minas.'
zh: 第二個來說：‘主啊，你的一百銀幣，已經賺了五百。’

en: And he said to him, 'And you are to be over five cities.'
zh: 主人說：‘你可以管理五座城。’

en: Then another came, saying, 'Lord, here is your mina, which I kept laid away in a handkerchief;
zh: 另一個來說：‘主啊，你看，你的一百銀幣，我一直保存在手巾裡，

en: for I was afraid of you, because you are a severe man. You take what you did not deposit, and reap what you did not sow.'
zh: 因為我怕你，你一向是嚴厲的人，沒有存的要提取，沒有種的要收割。’

en: He said to him, 'I will condemn you with your own words, you wicked servant! You knew that I was a severe man, taking what I did not deposit and reaping what I did not sow?
zh: 主人說：‘可惡的僕人！我要憑你的口定你的罪。你知道我是嚴厲的人，沒有存的要提取，沒有種的要收割嗎？

en: Why then did you not put my money in the bank, and at my coming I might have collected it with interest?'
zh: 那你為甚麼不把我的錢存入銀行，等我回來的時候，把它連本帶利取回來呢？’

en: And he said to those who stood by, 'Take the mina from him, and give it to the one who has the ten minas.'
zh: 他就對侍衛說：‘奪過他的一百銀幣，給那有一千的。’

en: And they said to him, 'Lord, he has ten minas!'
zh: 他們說：‘主啊，他已經有一千銀幣了。’

en: 'I tell you that to everyone who has, more will be given, but from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away.
zh: 主人說：‘我告訴你們，凡是有的，還要給他；沒有的，就算他有甚麼也要拿去。

en: But as for these enemies of mine, who did not want me to reign over them, bring them here and slaughter them before me.'"
zh: 至於我那些仇敵，就是不願意我作王統治他們的，把他們拉到這裡來，在我面前殺掉！’”

en: And when he had said these things, he went on ahead, going up to Jerusalem.
zh: 耶穌講完這些話，就往前走，上耶路撒冷去。

en: When he drew near to Bethphage and Bethany, at the mount that is called Olivet, he sent two of the disciples,
zh: 將到伯法其和伯大尼，就在橄欖山那裡，他差派兩個門徒，

en: saying, "Go into the village in front of you, where on entering you will find a colt tied, on which no one has ever yet sat. Untie it and bring it here.
zh: 說：“你們往對面的村子裡去，走進去的時候，就會看見一頭從來沒有人騎過的小驢，拴在那裡，把牠解開牽來。

en: If anyone asks you, 'Why are you untying it?' you shall say this: 'The Lord has need of it.'"
zh: 如果有人問為甚麼解開牠，你們要這樣說：‘主需要牠。’”

en: So those who were sent went away and found it just as he had told them.
zh: 被差的人去了，發現和主所說的一樣。

en: And as they were untying the colt, its owners said to them, "Why are you untying the colt?"
zh: 他們解開小驢的時候，主人問他們：“你們為甚麼解開牠？”

en: And they said, "The Lord has need of it."
zh: 他們說：“主需要牠。”

en: And they brought it to Jesus, and throwing their cloaks on the colt, they set Jesus on it.
zh: 他們把小驢牽到耶穌那裡，把自己的衣服搭在上面，扶著耶穌上去。

en: And as he rode along, they spread their cloaks on the road.
zh: 耶穌前行的時候，眾人把自己的衣服鋪在路上。

en: As he was drawing near- already on the way down the Mount of Olives- the whole multitude of his disciples began to rejoice and praise God with a loud voice for all the mighty works that they had seen,
zh: 他走近耶路撒冷，快要下橄欖山的時候，全體門徒因為所看見的一切神蹟，就歡樂起來，大聲讚美 神，

en: saying, "Blessed is the King who comes in the name of the Lord! Peace in heaven and glory in the highest!"
zh: 說： “奉主名來的王， 是應當稱頌的！ 在天上有和平， 在至高之處有榮耀！”

en: And some of the Pharisees in the crowd said to him, "Teacher, rebuke your disciples."
zh: 群眾中有幾個法利賽人對他說：“先生，責備你的門徒吧！”

en: He answered, "I tell you, if these were silent, the very stones would cry out."
zh: 耶穌說：“我告訴你們，他們若不出聲，石頭都要呼叫了。”

en: And when he drew near and saw the city, he wept over it,
zh: 耶穌走近耶路撒冷的時候，看見了城，就為城哀哭，

en: saying, "Would that you, even you, had known on this day the things that make for peace! But now they are hidden from your eyes.
zh: 說：“巴不得你在這日子，知道關於你平安的事，但現在這事在你眼前是隱藏的。

en: For the days will come upon you, when your enemies will set up a barricade around you and surround you and hem you in on every side
zh: 日子將到，你的仇敵必築壘攻擊你，周圍環繞你，四面困住你，

en: and tear you down to the ground, you and your children within you. And they will not leave one stone upon another in you, because you did not know the time of your visitation."
zh: 要摧毀你和你裡面的兒女，沒有一塊石頭留在另一塊石頭上面，因為你不知道那眷顧你的時期。”

en: And he entered the temple and began to drive out those who sold,
zh: 耶穌進了聖殿，就趕走作買賣的人，

en: saying to them, "It is written, 'My house shall be a house of prayer,' but you have made it a den of robbers."
zh: 對他們說：“經上記著： ‘我的殿是禱告的殿’， 你們竟把它弄成賊窩了。”

en: And he was teaching daily in the temple. The chief priests and the scribes and the principal men of the people were seeking to destroy him,
zh: 他天天在聖殿裡教導人，祭司長、經學家和民間的首領，都想殺害他；

en: but they did not find anything they could do, for all the people were hanging on his words.
zh: 但他們不知道要怎樣下手，因為眾人都圍著他，聽他的教訓。
